title: lastrea crassifolia
intro: Lastrea crassifolia, also known as the Rough Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Lastrea crassifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make tea or taken as a supplement to reap its health benefits.
